data.title: 国际服「Sheside Outside」PV转推活动

data.body:
🎉 Blue Archive PV Sharing Event! 🎉

Share the official PV on X (Twitter) or Facebook, and you could win a $10 Google Play Gift Card! 🎁

📅 Event Period: Until 1/31 14:59 (UTC)
🎮 50 winners chosen randomly!
🌍 Codes valid for US Google accounts only.

💡 Full details in our Discord! Don’t miss out! 🍀
➡️Official Discord: https://discord.gg/bluearchiveglobal
![GiDL6PhakAErHpe.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/dVtTQoCwsx8mVBfKnpHVJBkEUrWNAn7q.jpg)
